cpu: AMD A10-4600M APU with Radeon(tm) HD Graphics
title: Everquest ®

notes:
To work the game requires d3dx9_43. Load times are abysmal (in fact so abysmal that I got a connection timeout before I could finish loading), and so is performance (at least on my high res screen). Supposedly the game also requires wmi to work which is only supported on 32-bit prefixes, and therefore not in proton.

My first attempt to launch the game also failed, but the launcher worked the second time. I was using native runtimes instead of steams which may have had an impact on this.
title: Everquest ®
